title: Khaniker Atithi
actors: Robin Banerjee, Radhamohan Bhattacharya, Chhabi Biswas
plot: Khaniker Atithi is a 1959 Indian Bengali film, directed by Tapan Sinha and produced by S. B. Films. The film stars Nirmal Kumar,Ruma Guhathakurta and Chhabi Biswas in lead roles. The film had musical score by Hemanta Mukhopadhyay....
